plans.pageSubtitle: Manage your subscription and earn rewards by inviting other businesses.

referrals.pageSubtitle: Invite other businesses and earn exclusive rewards.
referrals.heroBannerPaid: Earn 1 Free Month of Pro Plan
referrals.heroDescFree: For every business that signs up with your link, we'll add 10 extra appointments to your monthly limit forever. They also get a welcome bonus!
referrals.heroDescPaid: Invite a business to Cronix. When they make their first payment, we'll gift you 30 additional days on your current subscription automatically.
referrals.step1: Share your unique link with other business owners (Spas, Barbershops, Clinics).
referrals.step2: They sign up by creating their free account.
referrals.step3: You receive your reward instantly (extra appointments) or when they upgrade to a paid plan (free months).
referrals.emptyReferrals: You haven't invited any businesses yet. Share your link to get started!

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: Cronix ("we", "our" or "the Platform") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose and protect your information when you use our appointment and service management platform.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect information in several ways:

s2Items.label: Registration Information:
s2Items.text: Name, e-mail, phone number, company and business data.

s2Items.label: Appointment Information:
s2Items.text: Client details, dates, times and booked services.

s2Items.label: Payment Information:
s2Items.text: Transaction data (processed by secure payment providers).

s2Items.label: Usage Data:
s2Items.text: Actions on the platform, pages visited, browser, IP and device data.

privacy.s3Intro: We use the collected information to:
s3Items: Provide, maintain and improve the Platform.
Send appointment reminders via WhatsApp and other notifications.
Communicate with you about changes, updates or security incidents.
Comply with legal and regulatory obligations.
Analyze use of the Platform to improve services.
privacy.s4Body1: Cronix uses Meta's WhatsApp Cloud API service to send appointment reminders and notifications. By using the Platform, you authorize sending these messages to your registered phone number. You can opt out of notifications at any time from your profile.
privacy.s4Body2: Meta processes data such as phone number and delivery timestamps. See the <link>WhatsApp Privacy Policy</link> for more details.
privacy.s5Intro: Your information is stored on secure servers provided by Supabase, which complies with enterprise-grade security standards. We implement:
s5Items: Encryption at rest for sensitive data.
Auditing of access to sensitive data.
privacy.s5Outro: However, no system is 100% secure. While we make reasonable efforts to protect your information, we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.s6Body: We retain your information while your account is active. If you request to delete your account, the data will be deleted within 30 days, unless the law requires us to retain it longer (e.g. transaction records for tax purposes).
privacy.s7Intro: Cronix does not sell or rent your personal information. We only share data when necessary to:
s7Items: Comply with the law or defend legal rights.
Other parties with your explicit consent.
s8Items: Request deletion of data (right to be forgotten).
Object to the processing of your data.
privacy.s8Contact: To exercise these rights, contact: tiendaigmimport@gmail.com
privacy.s9Body: Cronix uses cookies to improve the user experience, keep authenticated sessions and analyze usage. You can disable cookies in your browser, although this may affect the functionality of the Platform.
privacy.s10Body: Cronix is not directed at persons under 13 years of age. We do not collect information from minors. If we discover that we have collected data from a minor, we will delete that information immediately.
privacy.s11Body: We may update this Privacy Policy at any time. Significant changes will be notified by e-mail. Your continued use of the Platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
privacy.s12Intro: Cronix complies with privacy regulations including:
privacy.s13Body: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or your personal data, contact:

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Service
terms.s1Body: By accessing and using Cronix, you agree to comply with these Terms and Conditions. If you disagree with any part, you may not use the Platform. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.
terms.s2Body: Cronix is a SaaS appointment and service management platform that lets businesses schedule, confirm and remind clients of appointments via WhatsApp notifications. The Platform includes:
s3Items: Be at least 18 years old or an authorized legal entity.
Have authority to enter into binding contracts.
Not be on a sanctions list or restricted by law.
Comply with privacy laws when processing client data.
terms.s4Intro: When creating an account, you are responsible for:
s4Items: Notifying us immediately of unauthorized access.
Complying with all applicable laws when using the Platform.
terms.s4Outro: We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s5Intro: You may not use Cronix for:
s5Items: Illegal activities or those that violate third-party rights.
Sending obscene, defamatory or discriminatory content.
Reverse engineering or unauthorized access to systems.
Violation of third-party privacy without consent.
terms.s6Intro: You are the data controller for your clients. You are responsible for:
s6Items: Obtaining valid consent before collecting client data.
Informing clients about the use of WhatsApp for notifications.
Complying with GDPR, CCPA and local privacy regulations.
terms.s6Outro: Cronix acts as a data processor under your direction and is not responsible for how you use or handle client data.
terms.s7Intro: Cronix integrates third-party services such as:
terms.s7Outro: We are not responsible for these services. Review their terms and privacy policies before using Cronix.
terms.s8Intro: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW:
s8Items: Cronix is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind.
We are not liable for data loss, service interruption or incidental damages.
Our maximum liability equals the amount paid in the last month.
We are not liable for notification failures caused by the WhatsApp API or Meta.
terms.s9Body1: Cronix owns all technology, code, designs, logos and content of the Platform. By using Cronix, we grant you a limited, non-exclusive license to access it.
terms.s9Body2: You may not copy, modify, distribute or sell any Cronix content without written authorization.
terms.s10Intro: Prices are available on our subscription page. You agree that:
s10Items: Prices are in USD and may change with 30 days' notice.
Billing occurs monthly or annually depending on your plan.
We do not offer refunds (except if Cronix fails on a critical service).
You may cancel at any time and will lose access at the end of the period.
s11Items: Suspend your account if you violate these terms.
Terminate services with 30 days' notice for any reason.
Delete your account data 90 days after closure.
terms.s12Body: You agree to indemnify and defend Cronix against any claim, damage or cost arising from your use of the Platform, violation of these terms, or breach of applicable laws.
terms.s14Intro: Any dispute will be resolved through:
s14Items: Binding arbitration under chamber of commerce rules.
terms.s14Outro: Both parties waive the right to court litigation and jury trial.
terms.s15Body: These terms are governed by the laws of the country/state where the service is provided, without conflict of law provisions.
terms.s16Body: For questions about these Terms, contact:
